name: Permsin Steel Works Public Company Limited
summary: Permsin Steel Works Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes steel products in Thailand. The company offers coil products, such as hot and cold rolled products; galvanized iron products; steel, and aluminum or zinc products; high strength purlin products; and steel coatings, as well as c-line, c-u, t-bar, roll forming metal, and electro-galvanized steel products. It also offers metal sheets and PU foam sheets; and steel pipes. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Mueang Samut Sakhon, Thailand.
